steps.title: Find the second-session group
steps.content:
The second session had $64\%$ of the $1{,}500$ first-session attendees:
$$0.64(1{,}500)=960$$

steps.title: Find the third-session group
steps.content:
The third session had $35\%$ of the people who attended both the first and second sessions:
$$0.35(960)=336$$
The answer is 336.
